action_metadata.metadata_title: Withdraw 3,961,538 ada for Bringing Real-World Payments to Cardano with Wirex

onchain_context:
onchain recipient history: stake address stake1784sdxt6jjennmstphgdu7l7c2scf5d02a6cve2dgn5s2kq5u3j9v appears in 14 withdrawal proposals totalling 57273260000000 lovelace (first 2026-06-23 16:14:33, last 2026-06-26 13:51:52)
onchain DRep vote counts so far: yes=33 no=27 abstain=7 (explicit ballots, not stake-weighted)

fact_verdicts.note: Action id, type TreasuryWithdrawals, and exact title match SOURCE 0 header and anchor body.title.
SOURCE 0: 'Proposed epoch: 638  Expires after: 645'.
Anchor onChain.gov_action.rewards has key stake1784sdxt6jjennmstphgdu7l7c2scf5d02a6cve2dgn5s2kq5u3j9v with value '3961538000000'.
Budget Summary table: WP1 3,846,153; Intersect Budget Administration fee 115,385; Total 3,961,538 — all match.

Motivation: 'full-stack, open-source payments infrastructure that enables onchain settlement through smart contracts while connecting Cardano to banking rails, stablecoin systems, and wallet interfaces'.
Motivation: 'A core outcome is Visa card issuance linked directly to onchain balances, allowing users to spend digital assets globally at millions of merchants'.
Motivation: 'supports native integration with self-custody wallets'.
Motivation: '7M users, $20B+ in processed volume, and experience as a Visa Principal Member'.
Rationale (Strategic Pillar Alignment): 'more than 7 million users, over 1.5 million cards issued, and more than $20 billion in transaction volume'.
Rationale: 'achieved the required 67% support threshold during the 2026 Intersect Budget Process Hydra Voting phase'.
NCL Compliance section: '350M Net Change Limit' covering 'Epoch 613 to Epoch 713', not breached at time of submission on its own or in aggregate.

Audit & Oversight section states all three claims: costs within overhead, admin fee covers administrative oversight, independent oversight via Intersect and technically capable third-party with reporting obligations and milestone-based disbursement controls.
Prior Treasury Funding Disclosure: 'Wirex have not received ada from the Cardano Treasury within the last 24 months'.
Anchor states Intersect will utilize the Sundae Labs framework; the 2026 TRSC stake address stake1784sdxt6...u3j9v equals the onChain rewards key (withdrawal recipient).
Specifics: 'The Oversight Committee consists of Sundae Labs, Cardano Foundation, Dquadrant, NMKR, Sundial and Eternl' — all six names match.

Processes section: funding directed into the TRSC stake address, Fund action to PSSC 'When the Legal contract is prepared and the vendor is ready', and 'All milestones will be outlined within the metadata'.
SOURCE 1 recipient history matches exactly: same stake address, 14 withdrawal proposals, 57273260000000 lovelace, first 2026-06-23 16:14:33, last 2026-06-26 13:51:52.
SOURCE 1: 'yes=33 no=27 abstain=7 (explicit ballots, not stake-weighted)'.
SOURCE 1 treasury flow (36 epochs): inflow 158838297854652, enacted withdrawals 361435336000000, ratio 2.275492 — all three figures match.
values_hierarchy.md ranks treasury stewardship and downside protection (#2) above evidence quality and reproducibility (#3) and public-benefit ecosystem growth (#4).
Conflict handling default: 'If ecosystem growth conflicts with treasury stewardship and evidence is weak: prefer ABSTAIN'.
treasury_spending_doctrine.md: 'rejects first-come-first-served (FCFS) budget models and adopts a rolling-window Net Change Limit (NCL) framework'.

verification.summary: All 22 dossier facts are supported by the source material. Every numeric figure (3,961,538 ada / 3961538000000 lovelace, WP1 3,846,153, admin fee 115,385, 67% threshold, 350M NCL over epochs 613-713, 7M users, 1.5M cards, $20B volume, 14 proposals totalling 57273260000000 lovelace, votes 33/27/7, treasury inflow 158838297854652 vs withdrawals 361435336000000 at ratio 2.275492), every named entity (Wirex, Intersect, Sundae Labs, the six Oversight Committee members), and both stake addresses match the anchor document, on-chain context, and doctrine verbatim. No contradicted or not_found facts, and no invented specifics.
